body.title: PE chain: evict GOAL_READY from TWM after SCOPE_GUARD escalation so sprint doesn't re-fire
body.result: Added _evict_goal_ready_twm(ticket_id): expires GOAL_READY TWM slots so PROC_CODING_SPRINT stops re-firing. Called in pe_claim abort (not-pending) and after SCOPE_GUARD escalation. Non-fatal — logs and continues on DB error.
body.description: When SCOPE_GUARD sets basket['escalate_reason'], run_pe_entry_chain() returns early — before CLOSE_LOOP's attempt counter runs. GOAL_READY stays in TWM, PROC_CODING_SPRINT fires again immediately, same wrong hypothesis, SCOPE_GUARD blocks again — infinite loop. Fix: in run_pe_entry_chain() after scope_guard escalation, evict GOAL_READY TWM slot (cortex.twm_get_slots + expire/decay the GOAL_READY slot for this ticket) and increment attempt counter in GOAL metadata. Also: pe_claim abort (non-pending) should evict GOAL_READY the same way.
